Black Bean and Mixed rice

author: Katie Wolfe

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield: 6 servings

Ingredients

  • 1 pkg (6 0z) white and wild rice mix Vegetable cooking spray
  • 1/2 cup chopped onion
  • 1/2 cup chopped green pepper
  • 1/2 cup red pepper
  • 1 1/2 sliced mushrooms
  • 2 tsps Italian seasoning
  • 1 lb chicken breast, cooked and cubed
  • 1 can (15 oz) black beans, drained and rinsed
  • 1/2 cup whole kernel corn
  • 1/2 cup peas
  • 1 1/2 cup fat-free sour cream
  • 1 1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese, divided
  • Salt and pepper

Directions

  1. Cook rice according to package directions, discarding spice packet.
  2. Spray medium skillet with cooking spray; heat over medium heat until hot. Add onion, green and red pepper, mushrooms, and Italian seasoning; cook, covered over medium heat until mushrooms are wilted, about 5 minutes.
  3. Cook, uncovered, until vegetables are tender and excess moisture gone, 5 to 8 minutes.
  4. Combine rice, mushroom mixture, chicken, beans, corn, peas, sour cream and 1 cup cheese; season to taste with salt and pepper. Spoon into 2- quart casserole; sprinkle with remaining cup cheese. Bake, uncovered, at 350 until hot through, about 30 minutes.
